title: Accident prevention during inshore fishing operations
body: "Safety flyer issued with the investigation report into the grounding and capsize of the single-handed creel fishing vessel Lexi Rose (BF 370) on Melrose Point, north-east Scotland on 21 September 2023, resulting in one fatality.  The document summarises the circumstances of the accident and provides multiple safety considerations for members of the fishing community.  This information has been prepared for the:   fishing industry   Related publication  An investigation report has also been prepared for this accident.  "
